Natural cinematic realism still of SCARLETT in casual light-colored top with high-waisted linen shorts rising from the vanity seat with potential energy, shaking out her hair while holding the capped lipstick tube from (CORAL_LIPSTICK) in her open palm, captured at the exact instant she begins to step away from the white tabletop vanity in an intimate morning vanity room featuring a small round mirror and slim white surfaces, bright directional morning sunlight slicing across the white tabletop creating warm highlights and crisp soft shadows, peaceful intimate atmosphere with clean airy natural window light, eye-level medium shot with shallow depth of field emphasizing the held tube and figure against the gently blurred bright interior background.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. VANITY ROOM - MORNING - Small intimate vanity space with a white tabletop vanity table and a small round mirror
    - Image 3 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - Slim elegant lipstick tube with smooth cylindrical metallic casing in soft coral-pink finish
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
